Agentic development orchestrator

Usage: codexize [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --yolo               Seed newly created sessions with YOLO mode
      --cheap              Seed newly created sessions with Cheap mode
  -m, --message <MESSAGE>  Idea text for a direct-create YOLO session (skips the picker). Requires --yolo. The message is trimmed; internal whitespace and newlines are preserved verbatim. Blank-after-trim is rejected
  -h, --help               Print help
